name: web-component-json-codec
description: Portable strict HTML ↔ JSON serializer/deserializer for constrained whiteboard documents.

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target browser --format esm
scripts.build:demo: mkdir -p demo/dist && bun build demo/main.ts --outdir demo/dist --target browser --format esm && cp demo/index.html demo/dist/index.html
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun test && bun run build && bun run build:demo
